---
description: "Start working on a GitHub issue — research, plan, and implement."
mode: agent
---

# Start Issue

Work on issue #{{issue}} in this repository.

1. Read the issue to understand the goal and acceptance criteria.
2. Research the relevant code to understand what needs to change.
3. Plan the implementation — list the files and changes needed.
4. Implement the change, run checks, and fix any failures.
5. Summarize what changed, what was validated, and any remaining risks.

Keep the change focused on the issue scope. Do not add unrequested features.
